candidate_llm_application: Stress-stratified layer-wise training with monotone-decreasing input perturbation schedule with depth

results.judge_justification: Layer-wise Gaussian Noise Injection explicitly partitions noise budget across layers and rethinks layer-wise noise allocation — operationally the candidate's stress-gradient layer schedule (though motivated by privacy not robustness-emergent-tolerance).
Continued pretraining with irrelevant context injection improves robustness — gives layer-uniform perturbation as training augmentation.
Noise perturbation FT for quantization robustness; not layer-noise-gradient pretraining.

Crown-Frame-Reverse explicitly explores layer-wise scaling variants with monotone schedules — adjacent to the candidate's monotone perturbation schedule. Effect is similar (emergent layer specialization).
Monotonically-increasing layer-wise sparsity allocation; closely related to monotone schedule discipline.
